requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Controls — Ozone Depleting Substances Rules and Low-GWP Transition
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂管控——臭氧消耗物质规则与低GWP转型
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑管控——臭氧消耗物質規則與低GWP轉型

summary.en: India regulates ozone-depleting substances under the Environment (Protection) Act framework and the Ozone Depleting Substances (Regulation and Control) Rules and amendments. The Ozone Cell notice states that HCFC-141b import licensing is prohibited from 1 January 2020 and that use of HCFCs in manufacturing all new equipment is prohibited from 1 January 2025. Refrigerator exporters must document refrigerant and foam-blowing agents, confirm no prohibited ODS/HCFC use, and verify flammable-refrigerant safety where R600a or other hydrocarbons are used.
summary.zh: 印度依据《环境保护法》框架及《臭氧消耗物质（管制与控制）规则》及其修正案监管臭氧消耗物质。Ozone Cell公告显示，自2020年1月1日起禁止签发HCFC-141b进口许可证，并自2025年1月1日起禁止在所有新设备制造中使用HCFC。电冰箱出口商须记录制冷剂和发泡剂，确认未使用被禁止的ODS/HCFC，并在使用R600a或其他碳氢制冷剂时核实可燃制冷剂安全。
summary.zht: 印度依據《環境保護法》框架及《臭氧消耗物質（管制與控制）規則》及其修正案監管臭氧消耗物質。Ozone Cell公告顯示，自2020年1月1日起禁止簽發HCFC-141b進口許可證，並自2025年1月1日起禁止在所有新設備製造中使用HCFC。電冰箱出口商須記錄製冷劑和發泡劑，確認未使用被禁止的ODS/HCFC，並在使用R600a或其他碳氫製冷劑時核實可燃製冷劑安全。

standards_or_laws: Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 — legal basis for ODS rules
Ozone Depleting Substances (Regulation and Control) Rules and amendments — refrigerant and foam blowing-agent controls
Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment implementation in India — phaseout and phasedown framework

summary.en: China also implements Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment controls through its own national schedule and regulator. China export models commonly use R600a and cyclopentane for domestic refrigerators, but legacy refrigerants or foam agents may remain in older platforms or service-part documentation. India's prohibition dates and import licensing controls must be checked independently.
summary.zh: 中国也通过本国时间表和监管机构执行《蒙特利尔议定书》和《基加利修正案》控制。中国出口型号的家用电冰箱通常使用R600a和环戊烷，但旧平台或服务备件文件中可能仍存在旧制冷剂或发泡剂。印度的禁止日期和进口许可控制须独立核查。
summary.zht: 中國也通過本國時間表和監管機構執行《蒙特利爾議定書》和《基加利修正案》控制。中國出口型號的家用電冰箱通常使用R600a和環戊烷，但舊平台或服務備件文件中可能仍存在舊製冷劑或發泡劑。印度的禁止日期和進口許可控制須獨立核查。

standards_or_laws: China Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment implementation framework
GB 4706.13 — Chinese appliance safety test basis for flammable refrigerant aspects where applicable

gap.en: The India file should include a refrigerant bill of materials, compressor nameplate data, charge quantity, SDS, foam-blowing-agent declaration, service instructions, warning labels for A3 refrigerants, and importer declarations for customs or regulator requests. R600a is generally compatible with low-GWP policy direction, but flammability controls and charge documentation must be reviewed under India safety expectations.
gap.zh: 印度文件包应包括制冷剂物料清单、压缩机铭牌数据、充注量、SDS、发泡剂声明、维修说明、A3制冷剂警示标签，以及供海关或监管机构要求使用的进口商声明。R600a通常符合低GWP政策方向，但仍须按印度安全预期审查可燃性控制和充注量文件。
gap.zht: 印度文件包應包括製冷劑物料清單、壓縮機銘牌資料、充注量、SDS、發泡劑聲明、維修說明、A3製冷劑警示標籤，以及供海關或監管機構要求使用的進口商聲明。R600a通常符合低GWP政策方向，但仍須按印度安全預期審查可燃性控制和充注量文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under the Environment (Protection) Act / ODS Rules for controlled substances and licensing prohibitions. Where Indian law, BIS orders, QCO scope, licence conditions, or registration conditions specify safety standards for flammable refrigerants, those standards are compulsory for in-scope products.
mandatory_status.cn: China refrigerant compliance does not automatically satisfy India's ODS phaseout dates, import licensing position, or importer declarations.

source.publisher: Ozone Cell, Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not ship India models until refrigerant and foam-agent declarations have been checked against India's ODS rules and current Ozone Cell notices. R600a models still need charge, warning, and service documentation suitable for Indian safety and import review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】在根据印度ODS规则和现行Ozone Cell公告核查制冷剂及发泡剂声明前，不应发运印度型号。R600a型号仍需具备用于印度安全和进口审查的充注量、警示及维修文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】在根據印度ODS規則和現行Ozone Cell公告核查製冷劑及發泡劑聲明前，不應發運印度型號。R600a型號仍需具備用於印度安全和進口審查的充注量、警示及維修文件。
